sigWerErrors.reason: The substitution changes the tense from 'if it has been stolen' (past perfect conditional) to 'if it gets stolen' (future conditional). This slightly changes the nuance but does not derail the overall meaning of the sentence, as both refer to the possibility of the card being stolen.
